---
title: "Établi Plume"
sidebar: en
---

<img src="../_icons/icon-plume.svg" alt="" width="80" align="right" style="margin:0 0 1rem 1rem;">

<span class="etabli-badge">Offline tool</span>

> A fast, offline reference for typesetting commands.

Établi Plume is a categorised reference and snippet picker for LaTeX commands: commands, Greek letters, math operators, formatting, environments and bibliography — with a preview pane and favourites. Fully offline, no external dependencies. App ID `com.raban.etabli.plume`.

![Plume — the Dictionary on Android.](../_screens/0.1.0/01-dictionary.png){width=320}

> Plume is the deliberate renaming of the former **EtabliTeX**. Not affiliated with the LaTeX Project or TeX; the names TeX/LaTeX are governed by Knuth's TeX License and the LPPL.

## Who benefits

Anyone writing or teaching LaTeX who, on the move, needs to grab the right command, a symbol, or the skeleton of an environment — without firing up a search engine first.

## Platforms

| Platform | Status |
|----------|--------|
| iOS      | ✓      |
| Android  | ✓      |

## Privacy

No analytics, no third-party SDKs. The app runs fully offline; all content is embedded, no accounts, no telemetry.

## Installation

Établi Plume is **under active development**. There are no App Store, Google Play or F-Droid releases yet.

| Channel | Status |
|---------|--------|
| Android (APK) | **Development build** via [GitHub Releases](https://github.com/etabli-dev/etabli-plume/releases) |
| App Store (iOS) | planned — not yet available |
| Google Play | planned — not yet available |
| F-Droid | planned — not yet available |

Details: see [Getting Started](getting-started.qmd).

## Support

If you find the app useful: [Liberapay](https://liberapay.com/rabanheller/).
